issues.description: Missing PowerBoost action. Card text specifies 'Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle' but DSL only includes KO action. PowerBoost action must be added.

KO target scope is incorrect. Should target 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxPower condition, but the maxPower constraint should be part of the condition, not just the target. Current implementation may not properly restrict to 2000 power or less.
